name: HSBC Everyday Global
one_liner: Hold 10 currencies with no FX fees — ideal for new arrivals sending money home.
benefit: No foreign transaction fees on purchases in any currency; hold and convert between 10 currencies at competitive rates; free withdrawals at HSBC ATMs worldwide; no monthly account fee.

how_to_join.action: Apply online at hsbc.com.au or in a HSBC branch
how_to_join.detail: You will need a passport, proof of AU address, and a TFN.

how_to_join.action: Download the HSBC AU app and activate internet banking
Load a foreign currency in-app to lock in an exchange rate before overseas transactions

risks: Currency conversion rate is competitive but may not exactly match the interbank mid-market rate
HSBC branch support is limited to capital cities; day-to-day banking is online
Account opening may take several days if extra documentation is requested
est_value: Saves ~2–3% on every international purchase compared with standard bank FX fees
